scripts.dev:self-hosted: npm run prepare:demo-self-hosted && npm run dev -w @localizer/demo
scripts.prepare:demo-self-hosted: npm run build -w @localizer/cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js pull -o apps/demo/public/localizer-models -t micro
scripts.prepare:demo-self-hosted:ci: npm run build -w @localizer/cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js pull -o apps/demo/public/localizer-models -t micro,nlp --metadata-only
